ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique universal identifier for the training session */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title phrase of the training */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training */,
  "is_created_offline" INTEGER /* Indicates if the training was created offline */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the training session has been deleted */,
  "timestamp_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session was last updated */,
  "timestamp_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session was created */,
  "duration_in_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "training_category" TEXT /* Category of the training (e.g., clinical, administrative) */,
  "training_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the training (e.g., palliative care, medical records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training session is held */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed) */,
  "session_format" TEXT /* Format of the training session (e.g., in-person, online, blended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training material */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., PDF, video, presentation) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the material */,
  "material_size" INTEGER /* Size of the material in bytes */,
  "material_format" TEXT /* Format of the material (e.g., video/mp4, application/pdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_materials_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the staff member belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, doctor, administrator) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member enrolled in the training session */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_enrollments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_enrollments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_completions" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member completed the training session */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or grade received by the staff member */,
  "passing_grade" INTEGER /* Minimum passing grade required for the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_completions_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES training_enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the completion record */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the staff member (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_feedback_completion_id FOREIGN KEY ("completion_id") REFERENCES training_completions ("completion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the completion record */,
  "certificate_file" TEXT /* File path to the certificate */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_certificates_completion_id FOREIGN KEY ("completion_id") REFERENCES training_completions ("completion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or expertise of the instructor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_instructor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor assignment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the instructor was assigned to the training session */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_instructor_assignments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_instructor_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES training_instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_session_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., start, end, pause) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_session_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_access_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES training_materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_access_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
